name: Friendly Dragon
subject: fantasy
prompt: a chubby happy baby dragon standing and smiling, big round friendly eyes, two short curved horns, small rounded wings held up, a long curled tail with a row of soft rounded spikes down the back, a plump belly with a few belly-scale lines, short stubby legs with little rounded claws

name: Magic Castle
subject: fantasy
prompt: a whimsical fairytale castle with tall pointed towers topped by waving triangular flags, a big arched front gate, round windows, a winding path leading up to it, and a few fluffy clouds and stars around the spires

name: Wizard with Wand
subject: fantasy
prompt: a friendly old wizard with a long flowing beard and a tall pointed hat covered in stars and moons, holding up a wand with a glowing star, a long robe with wide sleeves, and a little round owl perched on his shoulder

name: Brave Knight
subject: fantasy
prompt: a brave knight standing proudly in plated armor, holding a tall shield with a star crest in one hand and a sword resting point-down in the other, a plumed helmet tucked under his arm, a cape flowing behind, and a determined friendly smile

name: Soaring Phoenix
subject: fantasy
prompt: a majestic phoenix with wide outstretched wings full of long flowing feathers, a graceful curved neck, a crest of feathers on its head, a long sweeping tail of flame-shaped plumes trailing behind, soaring upward with a few small sparkles around it

name: Noble Griffin
subject: fantasy
prompt: a noble griffin with the head and feathered wings of an eagle and the body, hind legs and tail of a lion, sitting upright on a rock with its wings raised, a sharp curved beak, alert eyes, and a tufted tail curled at its feet

name: Galloping Pegasus
subject: fantasy
prompt: a graceful winged horse galloping with its front legs lifted, large feathered wings spread wide, a long flowing mane and tail streaming in the wind, a gentle expression, with a couple of small clouds beneath its hooves

name: Magic Potion Shelf
subject: fantasy
prompt: a close-up of three bubbling magic potion bottles of different shapes lined up on a wooden shelf, each with a cork stopper and a little label, swirling liquid and rising bubbles inside, a few sparkles and a small sprig of herbs beside them

name: Crystal Ball
subject: fantasy
prompt: a round crystal ball resting on an ornate clawed stand on a small draped table, swirling mist and a tiny crescent moon and stars glowing inside the glass, a few sparkles floating around it

name: Genie and the Lamp
subject: fantasy
prompt: a cheerful genie with crossed arms and a friendly grin rising out of a curl of smoke from a magic oil lamp, a swirling smoky tail instead of legs, a small vest and a turban with a jewel, the curved lamp sitting on the ground below

name: Friendly Troll
subject: fantasy
prompt: a big friendly troll with a round belly, chunky arms and legs, a wide goofy grin, two small tusks, a tuft of messy hair, large pointed ears, and a little wooden club resting over one shoulder, looking gentle and silly

name: Baby Fairy on a Flower
subject: fantasy
prompt: a tiny cute baby fairy sitting on top of a big blooming flower, small delicate butterfly-like wings, a little dress made of petals, holding a glowing wand, big sparkly eyes and a happy smile, a few leaves and a curling vine around the flower
